examples: Denature: means to treat a meat product to make it unsuitable for use as food.
It is easier to denature plutonium than it is to denature the evil spirit of man.
A detergent used to denature proteins and cover them in uniform charge before gel electrophoresis.
But greed, in fact, prompts capitalists to seek government guarantees and subsidies that denature and stultify the works of entrepreneurs.
The usual forms of processing that involve heat treatment were found to denature, or destroy, the useful proteins in the mussels.
